summary: Frontend-only testing of Whirlpool brand landing page complete. All 14 sections rendering correctly with minor issues found.

issues: Whirlpool logo container in hero appears as empty/black box in screenshot but code shows logo is present at /images/brands/whirlpool.svg - may be loading/filter issue

seo_issues.expected: FAQPage ld+json schema should be present with 9 FAQ items
seo_issues.actual: Only LocalBusiness, SiteNavigationElement, and WebSite schemas present

seo_issues.expected: Should contain 'Expert Whirlpool appliance repair' as per seoDescription in brandLandingData.js

action_items: INVESTIGATE: FAQPage schema is defined in BrandLandingPage.js (line 124-132) but not appearing in rendered page - check if it's being overridden by another Helmet component
VERIFY: Whirlpool logo should display but appears as empty container in some screenshots - may be SVG filter issue
critical_code_review_comments: BrandLandingPage.js line 124-132 contains FAQPage schema but it's not appearing in DOM - possible conflict with other Helmet providers or SSR issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Whirlpool brand page is fully functional. All 14 sections render correctly: Hero (with breadcrumb, trust badges, CTAs, stats), Intro (bold first sentence), Carousel (3 cards desktop, auto-rotation works, arrows/dots functional), Common Problems (8 items on dark bg), Before You Call (5 items with checkmarks), Service Areas (3 columns - SF, Peninsula, North Bay with correct city pill links), Why FixitBay (4 cards with ghost numbers 01-04, no emojis, orange border-left), Reviews (3 cards with appliance badges), FAQ (9 accordion items working), Final CTA, Footer, Floating Button (desktop only), Mobile Sticky Bar (3 buttons). Design tokens verified: navy #0D1B2A, accent #FF5722. Bosch brand page also tested and works correctly with same template.
tests_passed: Hero section: breadcrumb, eyebrow text, H1 with San Francisco & Bay Area, trust badges (Licensed CA, 4.9 Google, License #51001, Same-Day), 2 CTA buttons, stats row (10+, 180, Same-Day)
Intro section: 2 paragraphs with bold first sentence
Carousel: 3 cards visible on desktop, prev/next arrows, 4 dot indicators, auto-rotation every 3.5s, cards have images/titles/issues/badges/VIEW SERVICE buttons
Common Problems: 8 numbered items on dark bg (#0D1B2A)
Before You Call: 5 items with checkmarks
Service Areas: 3 columns (SAN FRANCISCO, PENINSULA, NORTH BAY), 16 city pills with correct routes
Why FixitBay: 4 cards with ghost numbers 01-04, NO emoji icons, border-left 3px solid #FF5722
Reviews: 3 cards with appliance badges (WASHER, REFRIGERATOR, GAS RANGE), star ratings, quotes with border-left
FAQ: 9 accordion items with open/close functionality and chevron rotation
Final CTA: Schedule Your Whirlpool Repair title, hours block, 2 buttons
Footer: FixitBay logo, phone number, copyright 2026
Floating Button: appears after 300px scroll on desktop only
Mobile Sticky Bar: 3 buttons (CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US) visible on mobile after scroll
SEO: page title contains 'Whirlpool Appliance Repair in Bay Area | FixitBay', LocalBusiness schema present
Bosch page renders correctly using same template
tests_with_minor_issues: FAQPage schema missing from DOM despite code presence
Meta description uses 'Professional' instead of 'Expert' per seoDescription field
